message:
test(quic_h3): build deterministic E2E harness for native QUIC/H3 stack (12 tests)

Adds tests/quic_h3_e2e.rs covering full-stack integration:
handshake + RTT, bidi streams, multi-stream scheduling, H3 frame
encode/decode over QUIC, request-response lifecycle, graceful close
+ drain, key update, out-of-order reassembly, transport parameter
codec roundtrips, GOAWAY flow, deterministic RNG/time verification.

All tests are fully deterministic (DetRng + DetClock, no tokio).

Closes: asupersync-3narc.5.2.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
